name: Hot'n Spicy Shrimp Hbwk07a
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Gravy Master or Kitchen Bouquet
Bamboo skewers - soaked for 30 minutes in water to cover
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in a bowl and mix well.
2. Put shrimp in a zip-lock plastic bag and pour marinade over; close the bag.
3. Refrigerate for 24 hours, turning several times.
4. Remove shrimp from marinade and drain.
5. Thread shrimp on skewers with lemon wedges.
6. Broil or grill 4 to 5 inches from heat source for 3 to 5 minutes, turning and basting frequently until shrimp are done.
7. Do not overcook. Serve immediately with any remaining marinade. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
